calendarId.description: Calendar ID. Use 'primary' for the user's main calendar. Find other calendar IDs via list_calendars.

timeMin.description: Start of the time range (RFC3339 format, e.g. '2024-01-15T00:00:00Z' or '2024-01-15T09:00:00-05:00'). Only events ending after this time are returned.

timeMax.description: End of the time range (RFC3339 format). Only events starting before this time are returned.

q.description: Free-text search query matching event summary, description, location, and attendee details.

maxResults.description: Maximum number of events to return. Defaults to 25. Use pageToken from the response for the next page.

pageToken.description: Page token from a previous list_events response to retrieve the next page of results.

singleEvents.description: Expand recurring events into individual instances. Set to true with orderBy='startTime' to get events in chronological order.

orderBy.description: Sort order. 'startTime' requires singleEvents=true. 'updated' sorts by last modification time.

fields.description: Partial response fields selector to reduce response size. Example: 'items(id,summary,start,end,attendees)'. See Calendar API fields reference.
